description_long: This house features a single-story, L-shaped structure with textured beige exterior walls and a prominent terracotta-tiled hip roof. The roof includes a chimney and a small roof vent, adding architectural interest. The front facade has a simple entry door and a single rectangular window, both framed in white. The base of the house is bordered by a pinkish foundation trim, providing a subtle contrast to the wall color. The window arrangement is minimal and asymmetrical, with only one visible window on the front. The overall design is modest and functional, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, L-shaped house with beige textured walls, a terracotta-tiled hip roof, and a simple front door with one window.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entry door, a single window, and the L-shaped layout with the hip roof.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the roof's hip structure, the roof vent, and the absence of windows on this side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the long, uninterrupted wall with no windows and the chimney on the roof.
description_view_3: Side view showing the full length of the house, the chimney, and the continuous hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with no porch or steps, minimal trim, and no decorative elements.
